SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-23-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-23-2026 BY MURLENE J. RANDLE. PLAINTIFF VASYL OLEINYKOV IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GEARY COURTYARD 639, LLC. IS PRESENT, APPEARING IS SAMI JOE MANSOUR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MURLENE J RANDLE; CLERK: N.WEBB. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-23-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OLEINYKOV, VASYL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GEARY COURTYARD 639, LLC $9,150.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,240.00, $5,775.00 - ABATED RENT FOR 5.5 MONTHS $2,000.00 - EMOTIONAL DISTRESS $1,375.00 - FOOD EXPENSE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $11,275.00 FILED BY OLEINYKOV, VASYL AS TO DEFENDANT GEARY COURTYARD 639, LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-23-2026 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
